intro: Break the Routine. Escape the Room.
description:
You wake up in your apartment, surrounded by the stark, minimalist geometry of a black-and-white world. Your everyday tasks, such as making the bed, washing the dishes, and taking out the trash, appear ordinary. However, in this bizarre setting, completing these everyday chores is the key to accessing the outside world.

It's a unique first-person escape room experience that mixes everyday chores with mind-bending puzzles. As you navigate the quiet rooms of your home, observe your surroundings carefully. Trust your instincts as you collect useful objects, decipher cryptic symbols painted on the walls, and manipulate strange mechanisms hidden among your furniture. The answers to your escape are buried in the television static and the wall gears.

The striking low-poly art style, paired with subtle chromatic glitch effects and a haunting sense of isolation, transforms an ordinary apartment into an intriguing puzzle box. Complete your tasks, unlock the secrets of your home, and escape the monotony of everyday life to earn your freedom.
